title: Utility Classes

classes.name: MathOps
key_methods: static Number add(Number first, Number second)
static Number add(Short first, Number second)
static Number add(Integer first, Number second)
static Number add(Long first, Number second)
static Number add(Float first, Number second)
static Number add(Double first, Number second)
static Number add(BigInteger first, Number second)
static Number add(BigDecimal first, Number second)
static Number add(AtomicInteger first, Number second)
static Number add(AtomicLong first, Number second)
classes.notes: All methods static. Heavily overloaded add() covering all Java numeric type combinations (Short, Integer, Long, Float, Double, BigInteger, BigDecimal, AtomicInteger, AtomicLong). Returns narrowest fitting type (e.g., Short if sum fits, else Integer, else Long).

classes.name: Clock
classes.notes: Primary abstract method: currentTimeInMillis(). All other time methods are defaults derived from it. SYSTEM constant is a singleton anonymous impl.

classes.name: TokenStream
classes.constructor: TokenStream(String content, Tokenizer tokenizer, boolean caseSensitive)
key_methods: TokenStream consume(String expected, String... additionalExpected) throws ParsingException
TokenStream consumeUntil(String expected, String... skipMatchingTokens) throws ParsingException
inner_interfaces: interface Tokenizer { void tokenize(CharacterStream input, Tokens tokens) throws ParsingException }
interface CharacterStream { boolean hasNext(); char next(); boolean isNext(char); int index(); Position position() }
interface Tokens { void addToken(Position position, int startIndex, int endIndex, int type); void addToken(int startIndex, int endIndex, int type) }

interface Token { int type(); int startIndex(); int endIndex(); int length(); String value(); Position position(); boolean matches(String); boolean matches(char); boolean matches(int); Token withType(int) }
inner_classes: static final class Marker implements Comparable<Marker>
protected abstract class TokenFactory implements Tokens
static final class CharacterArrayStream implements CharacterStream

classes.name: Stopwatch
inner_interfaces: interface Statistics { long getCount(); Duration getMaximum(); Duration getMinimum(); Duration getTotal(); Duration getAverage() }
interface StopwatchSet extends Durations { Stopwatch create(); void await() throws InterruptedException; void await(long timeout, TimeUnit unit) }

classes.name: Collect
key_methods: static <T,V> Set<T> unmodifiableSet(Function<V,T> extractor, V... values)
static <T> Set<T> unmodifiableSet(Set<T> values, T... additionalValues)
static <T> List<T> arrayListOf(T first, T... additional)
static <K,V> Map<K,V> mapOf(K key, V value)
static <K,V> Map<K,V> hashMapOf(K key, V value)
static Properties propertiesOf(String key, String value)
static <T> void set(List<T> list, int index, T value, T defaultValue)
static <T> Set<T> minus(Set<T> subtrahend, Set<T> minuend)

relationships: TokenStream.StopwatchSet extends Stopwatch.Durations (separate class, different pkg)
MathOps uses BigDecimal, BigInteger, AtomicInteger, AtomicLong
important_notes: MathOps: purely static utility, ~970 lines of overloaded add() for every numeric type pairing; private constructor
Strings: @ThreadSafe final class; inner RegExSplitter implements TokenStream.Tokenizer for parsing identifiers
IoUtil: file/stream/classpath I/O + filesystem creation/deletion + available port detection; uses SLF4J LOGGER
Clock: interface with SYSTEM singleton; only currentTimeInMillis() is abstract; all others are default methods

TokenStream: @NotThreadSafe; rich parser framework; Tokenizer/CharacterStream/Tokens/Token are nested public interfaces; CaseSensitive vs CaseInsensitive token variants; Marker class for bookmarking position
Stopwatch: abstract class with static factory methods reusable()/accumulating()/multiple(); nested Statistics and StopwatchSet interfaces
Collect: static factory helpers for Map, Set, List, Properties with vararg key-value convenience overloads
